relationship.description: A department has many employee assignment history records
An employee may be assigned to multiple departments over time
A department can have multiple manager records (historical); at any time only one is active
An employee can manage multiple departments over time

metadata.improvements_made: Implemented the suggested unique constraint by defining DEPT_MANAGER as a weak entity with composite primary key (department_id, effective_from) to guarantee a single active manager per department. Added EMP_DEPT_ASSIGNMENT entity to capture historical employee‑department assignments, removing department_id from EMPLOYEE to avoid redundancy. Updated relationships to reflect the new assignment entity and changed DEPT_MANAGER relationship to 1:N (historical records) while preserving the rule of one current manager. Clarified entity purposes and ensured consistent naming and cardinalities.
